comment: Synthetic metastatic PDAC, pancreatic-head primary, hepatic + peritoneal metastases, ECOG 0, biliary stent placed (bilirubin 1.0 ULN), UGT1A1 *1/*1 wild-type, BRCA-WT, MSS, ECOG-fit; clinically a PRODIGE-4/ACCORD-11 FOLFIRINOX candidate (mOS 11.1 mo metastatic). KB drift: ALGO-PDAC-METASTATIC-1L step 3 free-text condition 'Bilirubin <1.5 ULN (resolved post-stenting)' has no engine evaluator → falls through to default IND-PDAC-METASTATIC-1L-GEM-NAB-PAC. IND-PDAC-METASTATIC-1L-FOLFIRINOX surfaces as alternative [standard] track; clinical recommendation per anchor remains FOLFIRINOX for fit ECOG 0-1, bilirubin-resolved patients. Documented for future ALGO patch (replace text condition with bilirubin_uln_x threshold clause).
